requirement_topic.en: KEBS EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (KS IEC 55032)
requirement_topic.zh: KEBS电磁兼容——辐射及传导骚扰（KS IEC 55032）
requirement_topic.zht: KEBS電磁相容——輻射及傳導騷擾（KS IEC 55032）

summary.en: Multimedia and wireless equipment must comply with Kenya Standard KS IEC 55032 (adopting IEC 55032) for electromagnetic emissions limits. Compliance is assessed by a KEBS-recognised laboratory. The KEBS Diamond Mark indicates product quality conformity with KS standards and may be required for regulated electronics on the Kenya market.
summary.zh: 多媒体及无线设备须符合肯尼亚标准KS IEC 55032（采用IEC 55032）的电磁骚扰限值要求。合规性由KEBS认可实验室评定。KEBS钻石标志表明产品质量符合KS标准，对于肯尼亚市场上的受监管电子产品可能为必要条件。
summary.zht: 多媒體及無線設備須符合肯尼亞標準KS IEC 55032（採用IEC 55032）的電磁騷擾限值要求。合規性由KEBS認可實驗室評定。KEBS鑽石標誌表明產品質量符合KS標準，對於肯尼亞市場上的受監管電子產品可能為必要條件。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 55032 — Multimedia Equipment: Electromagnetic Emissions (Kenya Standard)

summary.en: China GB/T 9254 (adopting CISPR 32) covers EMC emissions for multimedia equipment. GB/T 9254 test reports are generated by China CNAS-accredited laboratories and support domestic CCC or self-declaration. These reports are not directly accepted by KEBS but may serve as a technical baseline for KS IEC 55032 testing.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 9254（采用CISPR 32）涵盖多媒体设备的电磁骚扰。GB/T 9254测试报告由中国CNAS认可实验室出具，用于支持国内CCC或自我声明。这些报告不被KEBS直接接受，但可作为KS IEC 55032测试的技术基准。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 9254（採用CISPR 32）涵蓋多媒體設備的電磁騷擾。GB/T 9254測試報告由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具，用於支持國內CCC或自我聲明。這些報告不被KEBS直接接受，但可作為KS IEC 55032測試的技術基準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment: Radio Disturbance Characteristics (China, adopting CISPR 32)

gap.en: Kenya requires compliance with KS IEC 55032 assessed by a KEBS-recognised laboratory. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports are not directly accepted by KEBS. Separate KS IEC 55032 testing and KEBS Diamond Mark certification may be required for regulated product categories.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚要求由KEBS认可实验室评定的KS IEC 55032合规性。中国GB/T 9254测试报告不被KEBS直接接受。对于受监管产品类别，可能需要另行进行KS IEC 55032测试并取得KEBS钻石标志认证。
gap.zht: 肯尼亞要求由KEBS認可實驗室評定的KS IEC 55032合規性。中國GB/T 9254測試報告不被KEBS直接接受。對於受監管產品類別，可能需要另行進行KS IEC 55032測試並取得KEBS鑽石標誌認證。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KS IEC 55032 EMC emissions compliance, assessed by a KEBS-recognised laboratory, is required for multimedia and wireless equipment in Kenya. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports are not directly accepted. KEBS Diamond Mark certification applies to regulated product categories.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚要求多媒体及无线设备符合KS IEC 55032电磁兼容骚扰要求，并须经KEBS认可实验室评定。中国GB/T 9254报告不被直接接受。KEBS钻石标志认证适用于受监管产品类别。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯尼亞要求多媒體及無線設備符合KS IEC 55032電磁相容騷擾要求，並須經KEBS認可實驗室評定。中國GB/T 9254報告不被直接接受。KEBS鑽石標誌認證適用於受監管產品類別。

summary.en: Multimedia equipment must also meet immunity requirements under Kenya Standard KS IEC 55035 (adopting IEC 55035). This standard applies to immunity against electromagnetic disturbances for multimedia equipment including wireless and IoT devices. Testing must be conducted at a KEBS-recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 多媒体设备还须符合肯尼亚标准KS IEC 55035（采用IEC 55035）的抗扰度要求。该标准适用于包括无线及物联网设备在内的多媒体设备的抗电磁干扰能力。测试须在KEBS认可实验室进行。
summary.zht: 多媒體設備還須符合肯尼亞標準KS IEC 55035（採用IEC 55035）的抗擾度要求。該標準適用於包括無線及物聯網裝置在內的多媒體設備的抗電磁干擾能力。測試須在KEBS認可實驗室進行。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 55035 — Multimedia Equipment: Electromagnetic Immunity (Kenya Standard)

summary.en: China GB/T 17618 (adopting CISPR 35) addresses EMC immunity for multimedia equipment. Domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories support CCC or self-declaration processes. These are not directly recognised by KEBS for Kenya market access.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 17618（采用CISPR 35）针对多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度。来自CNAS认可实验室的国内测试报告支持CCC或自我声明流程，但不被KEBS直接承认用于肯尼亚市场准入。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 17618（採用CISPR 35）針對多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度。來自CNAS認可實驗室的國內測試報告支持CCC或自我聲明流程，但不被KEBS直接承認用於肯尼亞市場准入。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Information Technology Equipment: Immunity Characteristics (China, adopting CISPR 35)

gap.en: Separate KS IEC 55035 immunity testing at a KEBS-recognised laboratory is required. Chinese GB/T 17618 test reports are not directly accepted for KEBS certification. Both emissions (KS IEC 55032) and immunity (KS IEC 55035) must be addressed for full EMC compliance in Kenya.
gap.zh: 须在KEBS认可实验室另行进行KS IEC 55035抗扰度测试。中国GB/T 17618测试报告不被直接接受用于KEBS认证。在肯尼亚实现完整电磁兼容合规须同时满足骚扰（KS IEC 55032）和抗扰度（KS IEC 55035）要求。
gap.zht: 須在KEBS認可實驗室另行進行KS IEC 55035抗擾度測試。中國GB/T 17618測試報告不被直接接受用於KEBS認證。在肯尼亞實現完整電磁相容合規須同時滿足騷擾（KS IEC 55032）和抗擾度（KS IEC 55035）要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KS IEC 55035 immunity testing is required alongside KS IEC 55032 emissions testing for full EMC compliance of multimedia and wireless equipment in Kenya. Chinese GB/T 17618 reports are not directly recognised by KEBS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在肯尼亚，多媒体及无线设备实现完整电磁兼容合规，须同时进行KS IEC 55035抗扰度测试和KS IEC 55032骚扰测试。中国GB/T 17618报告不被KEBS直接承认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在肯尼亞，多媒體及無線設備實現完整電磁相容合規，須同時進行KS IEC 55035抗擾度測試和KS IEC 55032騷擾測試。中國GB/T 17618報告不被KEBS直接承認。
